title: Pan Seared Korean Perilla Seeds Flatbread
description: A floral and savory flatbread featuring perilla seeds, perfect for a midnight craving, with a Mediterranean twist and low fat content.
instructions: Combine yeast, sugar, and warm water in a bowl and let it sit for 5 minutes.
Add flour, miso paste, perilla seeds, salt, and olive oil to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Let the dough rest for 1 hour in a warm place until it has doubled in size.
Preheat a comal or a non stick pan over medium heat.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape and place it on the preheated comal.
Cook the flatbread for 2 minutes on each side until it is golden brown and crispy.
Repeat the process with the remaining dough pieces.
